fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKDocumentXpsOptions` controls how an XPS document is created by <xref:SkiaSharp.SKDocument.CreateXps*>. Set the desired raster DPI and other options before passing the struct to the factory method.

This struct is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
var options = new SKDocumentXpsOptions
{
    DPI = 300,
    AllowNoPngs = false,
};
using var stream = File.OpenWrite("output.xps");
using var document = SKDocument.CreateXps(stream, options);
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Specifies the options used when creating an XPS document.

fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the XPS document may omit PNG image resources; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether PNG image resources may be omitted from the XPS document.

fields.value: The raster image resolution in dots per inch.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the resolution in dots per inch (DPI) used for rasterizing content in the XPS document.
